name: chart-area-icons
visual_summary: A chart-area-icons component is a visual representation of data, displaying areas of a chart filled with icons to represent different categories. It is commonly used in dashboards, analytics, and data-driven applications to effectively communicate complex data insights. Suitable for when developers need to present data in a unique and captivating manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-area-icons
Description: A chart-area-icons component is a visual representation of data, displaying areas of a chart filled with icons to represent different categories. It is commonly used in dashboards, analytics, and data-driven applications to effectively communicate complex data insights. Suitable for when developers need to present data in a unique and captivating manner.
Style: modern, minimal, flat
Interactions: hover, clickable, animated
Tags: analytics, dashboard, chart

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
